summary.colorFormat: RGB, 3 channels per pixel, big-endian channel order
summary.channelNote: pixelChannelOffsets are 1-indexed relative offsets within the fixture strip. Pixel N at offset O uses absolute DMX channels: R=startChannel+O-1, G=startChannel+O, B=startChannel+O+1
